from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_469497ad(I):
    x1 = numcolors(I)
    x2 = decrement(x1)
    x3 = upscale(I, x2)
    x4 = objects(x3, F, F, T)
    x5 = argmin(x4, size)
    x6 = ulcorner(x5)
    x7 = llcorner(x5)
    x8 = shoot(x6, NEG_UNITY)
    x9 = shoot(x6, UNITY)
    x10 = shoot(x7, DOWN_LEFT)
    x11 = shoot(x7, UP_RIGHT)
    x12 = combine(x8, x9)
    x13 = combine(x10, x11)
    x14 = combine(x12, x13)
    x15 = underfill(x3, TWO, x14)
    x16 = objects(x15, T, F, T)
    x17 = argmax(x16, lrcorner)
    O = paint(x15, x17)
    return O
